productDisplayName: Jealous 21 Women Green Tunic Mirror Print Top
description: CompositionAqua green scoop neck long top made of 65% polyester and 35% viscose, with short puffed dolman sleeve and huge placement prints on the front and backWash care1. Do not iron on printFittingRegular FitGet ready to go out in this long aqua green top from jealous 21.
